choices.text: Triage classifier → domain specialist (billing/tech/sales) → tools (CRM lookup, KB search, order API) → resolution OR escalation. Persistence per customer (thread_id). RAG over support docs. Production: Intercom Fin, Zendesk AI patterns.

questions.prompt: Support agent confidently gives wrong answer to billing question. Fix?

choices.text: Confidence-based escalation + grounding in actual data. 1) Ground every answer in CRM lookup / KB search (not LLM general knowledge). 2) Confidence threshold — if LLM uncertain, escalate to human. 3) Citations required (every claim → source from CRM/KB). 4) Human approval for high-stakes responses (refunds, billing changes). 5) Feedback loop — track which answers customer accepted vs. complained about; iterate prompts/grounding. The 'over-confident wrong answer' is the #1 support AI failure mode; ground answers + escalate uncertainty + cite sources prevents it.

questions.explanation: Ground in data + confidence threshold + citations + human approval for high-stakes.
